allow: Bash(node -e "const knex = require\(''knex''\)\(require\(''./knexfile.js''\).development\); knex.raw\(""SELECT pg_get_viewdef\(''v_adjusted_trial_balance'', true\)""\).then\(r => { console.log\(r.rows[0].pg_get_viewdef\); knex.destroy\(\); }\).catch\(e => { console.error\(e.message\); knex.destroy\(\); }\);")

Bash(psql "$DATABASE_URL" -c "SELECT return_form, activity_type, COUNT\(*\) FROM tax_codes WHERE return_form=''1120'' GROUP BY return_form, activity_type ORDER BY activity_type;")
Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Get-Process node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id, CPU, StartTime")
Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3001 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object LocalAddress, LocalPort, State, OwningProcess")
Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Stop-Process -Id 44448 -Force; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3001 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object State -eq 'Listen'" 2>&1)
Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Get-Process node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id, StartTime" 2>&1)
Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3001 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object LocalAddress, LocalPort, State, OwningProcess")

Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Get-Process node | ForEach-Object { \\$id = \\$_.Id; \\$cmd = \(Get-WmiObject Win32_Process -Filter \\"ProcessId = \\$id\\"\).CommandLine; if \(\\$cmd -like '*app.ts*'\) { Write-Host \\"\\$id: \\$cmd\\" } }" 2>&1)
Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter ""name=''''node.exe''''"" | Select-Object ProcessId, CommandLine | Format-List")
